name: Adv. Priya Sharma
bio: Senior criminal defense attorney with 12 years of experience in the Delhi High Court. Specializes in cyber crime cases and has successfully defended over 200 clients.

name: Adv. Rajesh Kumar
bio: Leading civil litigation lawyer with extensive experience in property disputes and contract enforcement. Practises in the Bombay High Court and various civil courts across Maharashtra.

name: Adv. Sunita Mehta
bio: Compassionate family law attorney helping clients navigate the most challenging personal legal situations. Expert in matrimonial disputes, divorce proceedings, and child custody matters.

name: Adv. Amit Verma
bio: Corporate law specialist with deep expertise in M&A, joint ventures, and commercial contracts. Has advised Fortune 500 companies and Indian startups on complex transactions worth billions.

name: Adv. Kavita Nair
bio: A passionate advocate for citizens' rights with 11 years of experience in consumer protection cases and RTI applications. Known for her landmark PIL victories in the Madras High Court.

name: Adv. Sanjay Patel
bio: Dean of labour law practice in Gujarat with 20 years of experience representing both employers and employees in industrial disputes, wrongful termination, and wage disputes.

name: Adv. Neha Gupta
bio: Young but highly accomplished IP attorney specializing in trademark registration, copyright enforcement, and patent litigation. Represents major Indian and international brands.

name: Adv. Arjun Singh
bio: Veteran criminal defense counsel with exceptional record in NDPS cases, bail applications, and appeals before the Allahabad High Court. Known for thorough case preparation and client advocacy.

name: Adv. Divya Reddy
bio: Tax law expert with over 16 years of experience representing clients before the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal, GST Authority, and High Courts across India.

name: Adv. Manish Tiwari
bio: Expert in real estate transactions, property disputes, and RERA cases. Has represented hundreds of homebuyers in landmark cases against major builders in West Bengal and beyond.

name: Adv. Pooja Iyer
bio: Cutting-edge technology lawyer specializing in cyber crime defense, data privacy compliance, and IT Act matters. Regularly advises tech startups and multinational companies on digital law.

name: Adv. Vikram Malhotra
bio: India's foremost immigration attorney with 22 years of experience. Has helped thousands of clients with work visas, OCI cards, citizenship matters, and immigration-related litigations.
